title: Falling Boulders!
description: Enter a world full of soul crushing falling boulders!
body:
Have you ever looked at the other infuriating boulders on other  games and tought :
"Man i want that in minecraft"
well here you go enjoy over 3 types of boulders and variations of them in this amazing mod.
P.S. I know the main boulders texture looks bad but its a placeholder for now.
